_comment: Layer-3 MULTI-LEVEL fan-out on the FAST T4/Ollama/LFM2.5 path with CONCURRENCY (OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=4) — the substrate fix for multi-level completion that DiffusionGemma/L4 cannot do (vLLM --max-num-seqs 1 SERIALIZES the ~7-9 agent tree -> 20-min timeout; batched decode max_num_seqs>1 breaks block-diffusion serving). LFM2.5-8B is fast AND Ollama serves the coordinators+leaves CONCURRENTLY, so the LEAD->COORDINATOR->leaf tree can actually COMPLETE the synthesis. openclaw.fanout {max_spawn_depth 2 + maxChildrenPerAgent/maxConcurrent caps} drives the prescriptive coordinator-tier prompt (_fanout_lead_message_multilevel); openclaw.context keeps each agent bounded. Run: --gpu T4 --config configs/lfm2_ollama_fanout_deep.json --task examples/web_research_fanout_deep.json. BRAVE_API_KEY from ~/.env.
